name: Attack on Titan / A.O.T. Wings of Freedom
short_description: An international hit anime "Attack on Titan" has come to Steam®! Battle is joined between the man-eating Titans and Eren and his companions. Experience the illusion of being in the anime, and controlling the flow of the story. The story from the anime, with a few original twists, is yours to experience!
detailed_description:
An international hit anime "Attack on Titan" has come to Steam®!

Battle is joined between the man-eating Titans and Eren and his companions. Experience the illusion of being in the anime, and controlling the flow of the story.

The story from the anime, with a few original twists, is yours to experience!

* The images are from an in-development build and may differ from the final version.
